search_manifest.seed_order: 1-byte seeds first, then 2-byte seeds, each bucket big-endian
search_manifest.match_rule: generated seed prefixes are compared directly against BWT/MTF/RLE-transformed bytes
search_manifest.metadata_policy: BWT primary indexes and transform descriptors are charged before promotion; transform-only shortening is reported but not counted as a Telomere seed-span win
search_manifest.scope: classic preconditioner research artifact only; not .tlmr format support

transforms.name: mtf
transforms.description: Move-to-front byte ranks with a fixed 0..255 initial alphabet.

transforms.name: mtf-zero-rle
transforms.description: Move-to-front ranks followed by reversible zero-run packing.

transforms.name: bwt-mtf-b64
transforms.description: Block-local BWT followed by MTF ranks.

transforms.name: bwt-mtf-zero-rle-b64
transforms.description: Block-local BWT, MTF ranks, and reversible zero-run packing.

transforms.name: bwt-mtf-b128
transforms.description: Block-local BWT followed by MTF ranks.

transforms.name: bwt-mtf-zero-rle-b128
transforms.description: Block-local BWT, MTF ranks, and reversible zero-run packing.

summary.conclusion: BWT/MTF preconditioners did not produce exact seed-span rows.
